curation.synopsis: Garro, newly appointed Knight-Errant and answerable only to Malcador the Sigillite, slips aboard the Imperial Fists' mighty starfort Phalanx in search of a single warrior. Hidden behind locked doors are six former Librarians, exiled by the Council of Nikaea and cut off from the war beyond — and from the news that the Great Crusade has shattered into civil war. Garro must reach Yored Massak before Rogal Dorn himself catches up with him, persuade a man who has chosen silence to return to the killing floor, and convince a primarch with a famously short patience that this midnight intrusion is not treachery but the Emperor's will. A talky, close-quarters audio drama about oaths, divided loyalties and the slow gathering of the Knights-Errant.
